title: See the 'impossible' as sunrise and a total lunar eclipse appear at the same time on March 3
description: A rare atmospheric effect called selenelion could briefly let skywatchers see the rising sun and a blood moon at the same time.
content: A rare atmospheric effect called selenelion could briefly let skywatchers see the rising sun and a blood moon at the same time.
